hooks.command: cd "/Users/mac/Claude Code/vijay-dashboard/.claude/worktrees/heuristic-morse-62796a" && if ! git diff --quiet || ! git diff --cached --quiet || [ -n "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "Auto-deploy: $(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git pull origin main --rebase --autostash && git push origin HEAD:main && echo '{"systemMessage": "✓ Pushed to main — Vercel is deploying"}'; else echo '{"systemMessage": "No changes to deploy"}'; fi
